The '''ReliaCharger power calibrator''' was manufactured by [[Udrane Galactic Electronics]] and allowed a user to analyze and repair electronics. It could also be used as a portable source of power, capable of energizing smaller equipment for [[Standard day/Legends|days]] at time, or larger devices for shorter durations.

==Description==
The ReliaCharger was a model of [[power calibrator]] manufactured by [[Udrane Galactic Electronics]]. A common tool,<ref name="EGWT" /> it was used to evaluate the performance of equipment such as [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]],<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> and was capable of analyzing and repairing electronic circuitry. The ReliaCharger incorporated a circuit tester, connector rods, and a control [[Computer/Legends|computer]], and was employed to maintain [[Droid/Legends|droids]], vehicles, and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] computers.<ref name="EGWT" />

The ReliaCharger could also be used to provide emergency power to a range of common technological devices. It was capable of powering devices such as [[Datapad/Legends|datapads]] and [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojectors]] for several [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. The Reliacharger was also capable of power larger technology, but for more limited periods of time. A [[Droid/Legends|droid]] could be energized for up to ten [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], while a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] could be run for half and hour.<ref name="EGWT" />
